modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble connecting to Zoom or WebEx in conference rooms

full_description_text: The user is trying to set up a web meeting in a conference room. They’re specifically asking about connecting to Zoom and WebEx. It seems like they’re not sure how to get it working in the Lee Med room. They just want to join their meeting without any hassle.
short_description: Trouble connecting to Zoom or WebEx in conference rooms
description: The user is trying to set up a web meeting in a conference room. They’re specifically asking about connecting to Zoom and WebEx. It seems like they’re not sure how to get it working in the Lee Med room. They just want to join their meeting without any hassle.
